title: Volatility Surface Visualization
summary: Interactive 3D visualization of implied volatility surfaces across strikes and expirations. Built with Python, plotly, and real-time options data.
details: Real-time data ingestion from options chains across multiple expirations
Interactive rotation, zoom, and cross-section slicing of the vol surface
Configurable interpolation methods including SVI and SABR parameterizations

title: Systematic Backtesting Framework
summary: Event-driven backtesting system with realistic transaction costs, slippage modeling, and position sizing. Handles both equities and derivatives.
details: Event-driven architecture with fill simulation and latency modeling
Pluggable strategy interface with support for multi-asset portfolios
Built-in performance analytics including Sharpe, drawdown, and turnover metrics

title: Space Patrol ρ
summary: An ASCII space shooter built entirely with text characters.
details: Mouse to move, hold to fire
Built with React, rendered as ASCII art
